draft_v1: {"schema_v":1,"recipe":{"title":""},"steps":[{"instruction":"Choose a lidded saucepan (or pot) small enough that the eggs will be fully submerged when you add them to the water. Bring the water to a boil over high heat. Add the eggs, cover the pan, and remove from the heat. Cook the eggs according to the times given in the chart, then remove with a slotted spoon and serve immediately.","ingredient_lines":[{"raw_ingredient_text":"1 quart water for every 2 eggs"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"1 to 12 large eggs"}]}]}
